name: input_satisfies_config
description: A model input port satisfies the mandatory model_name config field. Tests _config_to_port logic.

data.label: LLM Inference
data._note: model_name is mandatory but NOT set — should be satisfied by 'model' input port

validation.note: model_name is mandatory in llm_inference but the connected 'model' input port satisfies it via _config_to_port mapping.

schema_validation.reason: _input_provides('model_name') returns True because 'model' port has data

config_precedence: 1. model input port provides model info at runtime
2. model_name config field check is skipped
3. Block's run.py uses ctx.inputs['model'] to determine the model
